race.comment: SIMONE'S CHOICE (3) ran below expectations last time at Corowa when in the market. Finds an easier assignment and has enough early dash to offset the wide draw to run them along. Can get the job done. HARRY DEVIL (1) broke through for his maiden win over 1150m at Leeton last time, scoring comfortably. Winning rider John Keating sticks and he cannot be discounted. RITA RED (8) has a moderate winning strike-rate but performed well last time at Leeton, finishing fourth and only 2 lengths from the winner. This isn't much tougher and if she brings her best she can take this out. SCREEN SPIRIT (4) has been much better in his last two and looks ready to put it all together, though is drawn awful. DEEBAA (9) was better last time at Leeton when finding the frame. Keeping safe in wider exotics.
